/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -s -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ascend_kernel.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libascend_kernel.so -o /home/s886374/kvoffload/ascend-kernel/python/ascend_kernel/ascend_kernel/lib/libascend_kernel.so CMakeFiles/ascend_kernel.dir/aclnn/avg_pool3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascend_kernel.dir/ops/cache_miss_topk/op_host/cache_miss_topk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascend_kernel.dir/ops/helloworld/op_host/helloworld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ascend_kernel.dir/register.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/python3.11.10/lib/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib  -L/usr/local/python3.11.10/lib/python3.11/site-packages/torch_npu/lib  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/tools/simulator/Ascend910_9382/lib  ../lib/libno_workspace_kernel.a -ltorch_npu -lascendcl -ltiling_api -lnnopbase -lopapi -lregister -lplatform -lascendalog -ldl /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64/libascendc_runtime.a -lruntime -lerror_manager -lprofapi -lge_common_base -lmmpa -lascend_dump -lc_sec -lregister -lascendalog -ldl
